nasb.text: Joshua captured all these kings and their lands at one time, because the Lord, the God of Israel, fought for Israel.

esv.text: And Joshua captured all these kings and their land at one time, because the Lord God of Israel fought for Israel.

cnv.text: 約書亞在這一次戰役中擊敗了這些王和佔領了他們的地，是因為耶和華以色列的　神為以色列作戰。

ccb.text: 约书亚能一鼓作气杀败诸王，征服他们的土地，都是因为有以色列的上帝耶和华为以色列人争战。
